name: sab-url
displayDescription: Self-hosted URL shortener service for SAB at t.sab.edu.vn. Needed for creating branded short links for event promotions and social media campaigns. Powered by Shlink with a custom web client frontend, MariaDB database, and OAuth2 proxy for member-only access. Contains 3 parts: Shlink backend, custom frontend client, and Nginx reverse proxy. Used by SAB board officers. Deployed via Docker Compose.
